prompt: An infinite wooden dining table stretches to the horizon under flickering candlelight. Every 14th plate is completely bare — empty, cracked, cold, surrounded by full overflowing plates of bread and fruit. The empty plates are starkly visible. One empty plate in sharp focus in the foreground. Cinematic, painterly, deeply melancholic. No text, no labels. Single frame. 4K. 16:9.
dataset_name: FAO - State of Food Security and Nutrition in the World 2023
insight: 733 million people go hungry every night despite the world producing enough food to feed 10 billion people.
